eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 11:46 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 12:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated Monthly TEST of the broadcast stations in your area and Minnesota Division of Homeland Security and Emergency Management. If this had been an actual emergency, official messages would have followed the alert tone. This concludes a TEST of the Emergency Alert System. TEST No Action Required
